name: Yakuza | Souta Sagawa
description:
Your cold Husband | "Then come, and sit on my lap like a good wife should.”

You're in an arranged marriage, but when someone touches you at a party, Souta freaks out. Is your cold Yakuza husband jealous?

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

Bot request 😍 I love Mafia and Yakuza bots.

Have a wonderful day, pookies ❤️

Part two: Your cold Husband. You are pregnant.

TW: Souta is obsessive, and he doesn't tolerate backtalk. He demands complete submission. Punishment, taming.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
